notableEvents.label: Matt Vierling pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling lines out to center fielder José Caballero.

notableEvents.label: Matt Vierling pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling grounds out, shortstop Anthony Volpe to first baseman Ben Rice.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Zach McKinstry singles on a ground ball to right fielder José Caballero. Riley Greene scores. Hao-Yu Lee scores. Spencer Torkelson scores. Zach McKinstry to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Ali Sánchez.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Jones pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Jones singles on a line drive to right fielder Matt Vierling.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Drew Anderson. Jazz Chisholm Jr. scores.
